user.title: Set up IP Management
user.description: This adds an "IP Management" panel to the sidebar for tracking subnets and the devices using them. No configuration is needed here — subnets are managed from the panel itself.

abort.single_instance_allowed: IP Management is already set up.

init.title: IP Management discovery options
init.description: Both discovery methods only fill gaps — they never override a device Home Assistant already knows the IP for.

data_description.enable_active_scan: Pings every host address in each subnet you've registered in the panel, then reads the ARP table to find its MAC address. Subnets larger than 512 hosts are skipped to avoid flooding the network.
data_description.active_scan_interval_hours: How often to repeat the active scan.
data_description.enable_passive_discovery: Listens for mDNS/Bonjour announcements (HomeKit, Chromecast, AirPlay, printers, etc.) instead of probing the network.
